# Real Solutions PH

> Real Solutions PH is a software development company in Batangas, Philippines, serving Philippine SMEs and international clients. We specialize in system integration, custom software, AI development, and web & mobile apps. Our prototype-first, AI-accelerated delivery system is led by senior startup engineers (head-of-engineering and lead-engineer level), letting us ship production-grade software faster and more affordably than traditional agencies — locally and internationally.

## Key facts

- Company: Real Solutions PH
- Location: Batangas, Philippines (serves PH + international clients)
- Founders: Ervin Piol (Co-Founder & Full-Stack Engineer, local clients & mobile) and Kairus Noah Tecson (Co-Founder & AI/Cloud Engineer, international clients)
- Differentiator: AI-accelerated, prototype-first delivery system run by senior startup engineers — fast and cost-efficient without sacrificing engineering quality
- Engagement model: managed software partner (not staff augmentation or freelancers); clients own their code and data
- Process: Discovery Audit (3–7 days) → Prototype Sprint → MVP Build (3–8 weeks) → Managed Growth
- Contact: executives.realsolutions.ph@gmail.com

## Services

- [System Integration](https://www.realsolutionsph.com/services/system-integration): Connect POS, inventory, CRM, HR, and accounting into one real-time system. From ₱42,000 (1–2 systems) to ₱455,000 (6+ systems).
- [Custom Software Development](https://www.realsolutionsph.com/services/custom-software): Production-grade software built around your workflow. From ₱63,000 (simple tool) to ₱1,050,000+ (advanced platform).
- [AI Software Development](https://www.realsolutionsph.com/services/ai-software-development): Custom AI wired into your existing systems. From ₱14,000 (feature) to ₱315,000+ (AI platform).
- [Web & Mobile App Development](https://www.realsolutionsph.com/services/web-mobile-apps): Conversion-focused websites, web apps, and cross-platform iOS/Android apps. From ₱17,500 (website) to ₱490,000 (advanced mobile app).

- [About](https://www.realsolutionsph.com/about): The engineering team behind Real Solutions PH.
- [Insights / Blog](https://www.realsolutionsph.com/blog): Guides on software cost, outsourcing, and integration in the Philippines.
